items.title: Hackers Exploit Gravity SMTP WordPress Plugin Bug to Expose API Keys
items.summary:
Threat actors are exploiting a recently patched security flaw impacting Gravity SMTP, a WordPress plugin that's installed on about 100,000 sites.

The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-4020 (CVSS score: 5.3), is a mediu...
